expected_score_rule: Contract-test expected values are explicit in this artifact; generated tests MUST NOT infer missing score/band/risk behavior from prose.

deterministic_generation.recipe: Serialize F001 using compact UTF-8 JSON. Set limits.max_input_json_bytes to exactly one byte less than the compact byte length. Input is rejected before semantic traversal.

required_assertions: input byte boundary plus one over limit is rejected
